column8: orig uses DDraw Lock/Unlock (vtbl[100]/vtbl[0x80]) on g_secondaryWorkSurface for 16bpp TGA blit; port has no DDraw secondary surface, listed in Phase 4(a) ARCH-DIVERGENCE DDraw manifest
orig inverts 16bpp RGB565/RGB555 pixels in-place via DDraw Lock/Unlock; D3D11 backbuffer has no scanline blit path, listed in Phase 4(a) ARCH-DIVERGENCE DDraw manifest
orig sets DDraw IDirectDrawSurface color-key via vtbl[0x74](sf,8,&key) using RGB565/RGB555 bit-depth conversion; port uses alpha blending instead of color-keying
orig dithers 16bpp surface pixels except color-key pixel via DDraw Lock/Unlock vtbl[100]/vtbl[0x80]; same DDraw collapse class, listed density-match in Phase 4 manifest
orig walks g_largeFontAdvance per-glyph and blits 24x24 sub-rects via vtbl[0x1c] Blt(0x11) to g_menuFontSurface; port collapses to fe_draw_text glyph-strip atlas (FontStr manifest)
